competitions_type_check.name: competitions_type_check
competitions_type_check.value: (type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['streaks'::character varying, 'apex'::character varying, 'clash'::character varying, 'targets'::character varying, 'race'::character varying])::text[])

uq_posts_workout_active.name: uq_posts_workout_active
uq_posts_workout_active.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND workout_id IS NOT NULL AND share_to_feed)

uq_posts_workout_story.name: uq_posts_workout_story
uq_posts_workout_story.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND workout_id IS NOT NULL AND share_to_story AND NOT share_to_feed)
